property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files
odejs
ode_modules;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Kubernetes\Minikube;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.15 in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11 in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Python in;.

testcase.name: testCreateUser
testcase.system-out:
Before Suite running User Payload in CreateUser is:User [usename =Dina Haag, firstName=Tonda, lastName=Flatley, email =emelina.witting@example.com ,phone= 194-253-7585, id= 1437129801 ] HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Fri, 24 Apr 2026 10:30:47 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1437129801" }
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. 2026-04-24T10:30:48.667202Z main ERROR File contains an invalid element or attribute "JsonTemplateLayout"

testcase.name: testUserCreateDatadriven[1, Shrithi Bhav, Shruthi, Bhav, shrithi.bhav@gmail.com, test@1, 2345678923](1)
testcase.system-out:
Cell value is:1 Cell value is:Shrithi Bhav Cell value is:Shruthi Cell value is:Bhav Cell value is:shrithi.bhav@gmail.com Cell value is:test@1 Cell value is:2345678923 Cell value is:2 Cell value is:Yamini Gila Cell value is:Yamini Cell value is:Gila Cell value is:yamini.gila@gmail.com Cell value is:test@2 Cell value is:2356789765 Cell value is:3 Cell value is:Gowtami Renuka Cell value is:Gowtami Cell value is:Renuka Cell value is:gowtami.renuka@gmail.com Cell value is:test@3 Cell value is:2312345678 In testUserCreateDatadriven userId is1 User Payload in CreateUser is:User [usename =Shrithi Bhav, firstName=Shruthi, lastName=Bhav, email =shrithi.bhav@gmail.com ,phone= 2345678923, id= 1 ] HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Fri, 24 Apr 2026 10:30:55 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1" }
